name: codex-usage-monitor
description: Codex Companion adds telemetry, a control center, and privacy-safe, recoverable handoffs to new tasks.

interface.shortDescription: Action platform, Task Cockpit, widgets, and telemetry
interface.longDescription: Extends Codex with Quick Actions, an Action Registry, Composer Footer API, sandboxed Widget SDK and Manager, current-task Task Cockpit, session-isolated telemetry, advisory budgets, project insights, Safe Handoff Builder, native history focus, and privacy-safe diagnostics.
